name: Rohit Sharma
conversationHistory: Called Rohit, he loved the product. Budget approved. Needs proposal ASAP.
followUpDraft:
Subject: Proposal on the way + let's lock the demo

Hi Rohit — glad the product resonated on our call and that budget's moving forward on your end. The proposal is being finalized now and will be in your inbox by Friday as promised; I've also held a couple of demo windows open so we can pick one that suits your schedule. Just send over a time block that works and I'll match it. Looking forward to keeping this momentum going.
